title: Openable
description: Open and close doors, trapdoors and fence gates quickly.
body:
## 🚪 Openable
Open and close doors, trapdoors and fence gates quickly. This is a pretty useful replacement for pressure plates and now, you also have it as a datapack!

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/H2H118OP6T)

## Showcase
![A quick showcase of the datapack](https://github.com/Sheepearrrrrrrrrr/Sheepearrrrrrrrrr.github.io/blob/main/about/yippe3.gif?raw=true)
